## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated, and `pytest -q` passes (backend).
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm build` pass (frontend, if touched).
- [ ] Public behavior changes are documented in the `README.md`.
- [ ] Deterministic governance guarantees are preserved — the LLM does not
      decide gate outcomes.
